description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of light gray mesh and textured silver overlays, with a prominent black Nike Swoosh on both sides. The upper is constructed from a mix of synthetic leather and textile materials, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and the lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in a matching gray color. The midsole is white with a slightly textured gray outsole, designed for traction and support. Branding details include a black 'NIKE' logo on the heel tab and a black Nike label on the tongue. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A stylish low-top Nike sneaker in gray and silver with black branding, featuring a mix of mesh and synthetic leather, and a comfortable padded collar.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe box, gray laces, and padded tongue with the Nike logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black Nike Swoosh, silver textured overlays, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the white heel tab with bold black 'NIKE' lettering and the padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the Swoosh and the detailed paneling of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on both sides, black 'NIKE' text on heel tab, black Nike label on tongue
